title: Inu X Boku Secret Service
sourceNotes: Single-cour 12-episode anime (David Production, 2012), a faithful no-filler adaptation of the early manga (Cocoa Fujiwara). Manga complete at 61 chapters / 11 volumes (2009-2014). The anime covers only the opening stretch of the story, ending roughly around chapter 14 (through volume 3); sources on the exact cutoff conflict (cited anywhere from ch. 10-14), so the boundary here is approximate - refine via PR. The manga continues well past the anime with a major unadapted Time Skip arc starting around chapter 19.

mappings.arc: Anime Story (Roppongi household, early spirit cases)
